/**
 * Scraper Queue Service
 * Manages scraper job queue with retry logic and error recovery
 */

import { logger } from './loggerService';
import { createAppError } from '../middleware/errorHandler';
import { ErrorCode } from '../constants/errorCodes';
import { getSocketInstance } from './socketManager';
import { errorRecoveryService, ErrorType } from './errorRecoveryService';
import { scraperRateLimiter, ScraperRateLimitConfig } from './scraperRateLimiter';

/**
 * Scraper Job Interface
 */
export interface ScraperJob {
  id: string;
  sourceId: string;
  status: 'PENDING' | 'RUNNING' | 'SUCCESS' | 'FAILED';
  retryCount: number;
  maxRetries: number;
  startedAt?: Date;
  completedAt?: Date;
  error?: string;
  result?: any;
  createdAt: Date;
  priority: number; // Higher number = higher priority
}

/**
 * Job Queue Entry
 */
interface QueueEntry {
  job: ScraperJob;
  timestamp: number;
}

/**
 * Scraper Queue Service
 */
export class ScraperQueueService {
  private queue: Map<string, QueueEntry> = new Map();
  private runningJobs: Set<string> = new Set();
  private maxConcurrentJobs: number = 3;
  private jobIdCounter: number = 0;

  constructor(maxConcurrentJobs: number = 3) {
    this.maxConcurrentJobs = maxConcurrentJobs;
  }

  /**
   * Enqueue new job
   */
  enqueueJob(sourceId: string, options?: {
    priority?: number;
    maxRetries?: number;
  }): ScraperJob {
    try {
      const timestamp = Date.now();
      const jobId = `job-${timestamp}-${++this.jobIdCounter}`;

      const job: ScraperJob = {
        id: jobId,
        sourceId,
        status: 'PENDING',
        retryCount: 0,
        maxRetries: options?.maxRetries ?? 3,
        createdAt: new Date(),
        priority: options?.priority ?? 0,
      };

      this.queue.set(jobId, {
        job,
        timestamp: timestamp + this.jobIdCounter, // Add counter to ensure unique ordering
      });

      logger.info('Job enqueued', {
        jobId,
        sourceId,
        priority: job.priority,
        queueSize: this.queue.size,
      });

      // Emit Socket.io event
      const io = getSocketInstance();
      if (io) {
        io.emit('scraper:queue:updated', {
          action: 'enqueued',
          job,
          queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
        });
      }

      return job;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to enqueue job', error as Error, { sourceId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Dequeue next job
   */
  dequeueJob(): ScraperJob | null {
    try {
      // Check if queue is full
      if (this.isQueueFull()) {
        return null;
      }

      // Get all pending jobs sorted by priority (descending) and creation time (ascending)
      const pendingJobs = Array.from(this.queue.values())
        .filter(entry => entry.job.status === 'PENDING')
        .sort((a, b) => {
          // Sort by priority (higher first)
          if (a.job.priority !== b.job.priority) {
            return b.job.priority - a.job.priority;
          }
          // Then by creation time (older first)
          return a.timestamp - b.timestamp;
        });

      if (pendingJobs.length === 0) {
        return null;
      }

      const nextEntry = pendingJobs[0];
      const job = nextEntry.job;

      // Update job status
      job.status = 'RUNNING';
      job.startedAt = new Date();
      this.runningJobs.add(job.id);

      logger.info('Job dequeued', {
        jobId: job.id,
        sourceId: job.sourceId,
        remainingPending: pendingJobs.length - 1,
        runningJobs: this.runningJobs.size,
      });

      // Emit Socket.io event
      const io = getSocketInstance();
      if (io) {
        io.emit('scraper:job:started', {
          job,
          queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
        });
      }

      return job;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to dequeue job', error as Error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get job status
   */
  getJobStatus(jobId: string): ScraperJob | null {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);
      return entry ? entry.job : null;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to get job status', error as Error, { jobId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Mark job as completed
   */
  completeJob(jobId: string, result?: any): ScraperJob {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);

      if (!entry) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job tidak ditemukan',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          404
        );
      }

      const job = entry.job;
      job.status = 'SUCCESS';
      job.completedAt = new Date();
      job.result = result;
      this.runningJobs.delete(jobId);

      logger.info('Job completed', {
        jobId,
        sourceId: job.sourceId,
        duration: job.completedAt.getTime() - (job.startedAt?.getTime() || 0),
      });

      // Emit Socket.io event
      const io = getSocketInstance();
      if (io) {
        io.emit('scraper:job:completed', {
          job,
          queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
        });
      }

      return job;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to complete job', error as Error, { jobId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Mark job as failed with intelligent retry logic
   */
  failJob(jobId: string, error: string, errorObject?: any): ScraperJob {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);

      if (!entry) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job tidak ditemukan',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          404
        );
      }

      const job = entry.job;
      job.error = error;
      this.runningJobs.delete(jobId);

      // Classify error to determine if retry is appropriate
      const errorClassification = errorRecoveryService.classifyError(
        errorObject || new Error(error)
      );

      // Increment retry count first
      job.retryCount++;

      // Determine if we should retry based on error classification and retry count
      const shouldRetry =
        errorClassification.isRetryable &&
        job.retryCount < job.maxRetries &&
        job.retryCount <= errorClassification.maxRetries;

      if (shouldRetry) {
        job.status = 'PENDING';

        // Calculate retry delay using exponential backoff
        const retryDelay = errorRecoveryService.calculateRetryDelay(
          job.retryCount - 1
        );

        logger.warn('Job failed, will retry with intelligent backoff', {
          jobId,
          sourceId: job.sourceId,
          retryCount: job.retryCount,
          maxRetries: job.maxRetries,
          errorType: errorClassification.type,
          retryDelay,
          error,
        });

        // Emit Socket.io event for retry
        const io = getSocketInstance();
        if (io) {
          io.emit('scraper:job:failed', {
            job,
            willRetry: true,
            errorType: errorClassification.type,
            retryDelay,
            queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
          });
        }
      } else {
        job.status = 'FAILED';
        job.completedAt = new Date();

        const errorObj = new Error(error);
        logger.error('Job failed permanently', errorObj, {
          jobId,
          sourceId: job.sourceId,
          retryCount: job.retryCount,
          errorType: errorClassification.type,
          isRetryable: errorClassification.isRetryable,
          reason: !errorClassification.isRetryable
            ? 'Error is not retryable'
            : 'Max retries exceeded',
        });

        // Emit Socket.io event for permanent failure
        const io = getSocketInstance();
        if (io) {
          io.emit('scraper:job:failed', {
            job,
            willRetry: false,
            errorType: errorClassification.type,
            queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
          });
        }
      }

      return job;
    } catch (err) {
      const errorObj = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error(String(err));
      logger.error('Failed to mark job as failed', errorObj, { jobId });
      throw err;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Retry job
   */
  retryJob(jobId: string): ScraperJob {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);

      if (!entry) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job tidak ditemukan',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          404
        );
      }

      const job = entry.job;

      if (job.retryCount >= job.maxRetries) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job sudah mencapai maksimal retry',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          400
        );
      }

      job.status = 'PENDING';
      job.retryCount++;
      job.error = undefined;
      this.runningJobs.delete(jobId);

      logger.info('Job retried', {
        jobId,
        sourceId: job.sourceId,
        retryCount: job.retryCount,
      });

      return job;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to retry job', error as Error, { jobId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Cancel job
   */
  cancelJob(jobId: string): ScraperJob {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);

      if (!entry) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job tidak ditemukan',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          404
        );
      }

      const job = entry.job;

      if (job.status === 'SUCCESS' || job.status === 'FAILED') {
        throw createAppError(
          'Tidak bisa cancel job yang sudah selesai',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          400
        );
      }

      job.status = 'FAILED';
      job.error = 'Job dibatalkan oleh user';
      job.completedAt = new Date();
      this.runningJobs.delete(jobId);

      logger.info('Job cancelled', {
        jobId,
        sourceId: job.sourceId,
      });

      return job;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to cancel job', error as Error, { jobId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get queue statistics
   */
  getQueueStats(): {
    total: number;
    pending: number;
    running: number;
    completed: number;
    failed: number;
    avgWaitTime: number;
    avgProcessTime: number;
  } {
    try {
      const jobs = Array.from(this.queue.values()).map(entry => entry.job);

      const pending = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'PENDING').length;
      const running = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'RUNNING').length;
      const completed = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'SUCCESS').length;
      const failed = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'FAILED').length;

      // Calculate average wait time
      const pendingJobs = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'PENDING');
      const avgWaitTime = pendingJobs.length > 0
        ? pendingJobs.reduce((sum, j) => sum + (Date.now() - j.createdAt.getTime()), 0) / pendingJobs.length
        : 0;

      // Calculate average process time
      const completedJobs = jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'SUCCESS' && j.startedAt && j.completedAt);
      const avgProcessTime = completedJobs.length > 0
        ? completedJobs.reduce((sum, j) => sum + (j.completedAt!.getTime() - j.startedAt!.getTime()), 0) / completedJobs.length
        : 0;

      logger.info('Queue stats retrieved', {
        total: jobs.length,
        pending,
        running,
        completed,
        failed,
      });

      return {
        total: jobs.length,
        pending,
        running,
        completed,
        failed,
        avgWaitTime: Math.round(avgWaitTime),
        avgProcessTime: Math.round(avgProcessTime),
      };
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to get queue stats', error as Error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get all jobs
   */
  getAllJobs(filters?: {
    status?: 'PENDING' | 'RUNNING' | 'SUCCESS' | 'FAILED';
    sourceId?: string;
  }): ScraperJob[] {
    try {
      let entries = Array.from(this.queue.values());

      if (filters?.status) {
        entries = entries.filter(entry => entry.job.status === filters.status);
      }

      if (filters?.sourceId) {
        entries = entries.filter(entry => entry.job.sourceId === filters.sourceId);
      }

      // Sort by timestamp (descending - newest first)
      return entries
        .sort((a, b) => b.timestamp - a.timestamp)
        .map(entry => entry.job);
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to get all jobs', error as Error, { filters });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Clear completed jobs
   */
  clearCompletedJobs(): number {
    try {
      let cleared = 0;

      for (const [jobId, entry] of this.queue.entries()) {
        if (entry.job.status === 'SUCCESS' || entry.job.status === 'FAILED') {
          this.queue.delete(jobId);
          cleared++;
        }
      }

      logger.info('Completed jobs cleared', { cleared, remaining: this.queue.size });

      return cleared;
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to clear completed jobs', error as Error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Check if queue is full
   */
  isQueueFull(): boolean {
    return this.runningJobs.size >= this.maxConcurrentJobs;
  }

  /**
   * Get available slots
   */
  getAvailableSlots(): number {
    return Math.max(0, this.maxConcurrentJobs - this.runningJobs.size);
  }

  /**
   * Set max concurrent jobs
   */
  setMaxConcurrentJobs(max: number): void {
    if (max < 1) {
      throw createAppError(
        'Max concurrent jobs harus >= 1',
        ErrorCode.SCRAPER_INVALID_CONFIG,
        400
      );
    }

    this.maxConcurrentJobs = max;
    logger.info('Max concurrent jobs updated', { max });
  }

  /**
   * Clear all jobs
   */
  clearAll(): void {
    try {
      const size = this.queue.size;
      this.queue.clear();
      this.runningJobs.clear();

      logger.info('Queue cleared', { jobsCleared: size });

      // Emit Socket.io event
      const io = getSocketInstance();
      if (io) {
        io.emit('scraper:queue:updated', {
          action: 'cleared',
          queueStats: this.getQueueStats(),
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to clear queue', error as Error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Update job progress (for real-time monitoring)
   */
  updateJobProgress(jobId: string, progress: {
    percentage?: number;
    message?: string;
    itemsProcessed?: number;
    totalItems?: number;
  }): void {
    try {
      const entry = this.queue.get(jobId);

      if (!entry) {
        throw createAppError(
          'Job tidak ditemukan',
          ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
          404
        );
      }

      const job = entry.job;

      // Emit Socket.io event for progress
      const io = getSocketInstance();
      if (io) {
        io.emit('scraper:job:progress', {
          jobId: job.id,
          sourceId: job.sourceId,
          progress,
          timestamp: new Date(),
        });
      }

      logger.debug('Job progress updated', {
        jobId,
        progress,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      logger.error('Failed to update job progress', error as Error, { jobId });
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Execute scraper job with error recovery and rate limiting
   */
  async executeJobWithRecovery(
    jobId: string,
    operation: () => Promise<any>,
    rateLimitConfig?: ScraperRateLimitConfig
  ): Promise<any> {
    const job = this.getJobStatus(jobId);
    if (!job) {
      throw createAppError(
        'Job tidak ditemukan',
        ErrorCode.SCRAPER_EXECUTION_FAILED,
        404
      );
    }

    try {
      // Default rate limit config if not provided
      const defaultRateLimitConfig: ScraperRateLimitConfig = {
        requestsPerMinute: 10,
        burstLimit: 15,
        minDelay: 1000,
      };

      const finalRateLimitConfig = rateLimitConfig || defaultRateLimitConfig;

      // Execute with rate limiting, circuit breaker, and retry logic
      const result = await scraperRateLimiter.executeWithRateLimitAndRecovery(
        job.sourceId,
        finalRateLimitConfig,
        operation,
        {
          maxRetries: job.maxRetries,
          onRetry: (error, attempt, delay) => {
            logger.warn('Scraper job retry', {
              jobId,
              sourceId: job.sourceId,
              attempt,
              delay,
              error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
            });

            // Update job progress
            this.updateJobProgress(jobId, {
              message: `Retrying after error (attempt ${attempt})`,
              percentage: 0,
            });
          },
        }
      );

      // Mark job as completed
      this.completeJob(jobId, result);
      return result;
    } catch (error) {
      // Mark job as failed with error classification
      this.failJob(
        jobId,
        error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        error
      );
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get circuit breaker stats for a source
   */
  getCircuitBreakerStats(sourceId: string): any {
    const breakerName = `scraper-source-${sourceId}`;
    const breaker = errorRecoveryService.getCircuitBreaker(breakerName);
    return breaker ? breaker.getStats() : null;
  }

  /**
   * Reset circuit breaker for a source
   */
  resetCircuitBreaker(sourceId: string): void {
    const breakerName = `scraper-source-${sourceId}`;
    errorRecoveryService.resetCircuitBreaker(breakerName);
    logger.info('Circuit breaker reset for source', { sourceId });
  }

  /**
   * Get rate limit status for a source
   */
  getRateLimitStatus(
    sourceId: string,
    config: ScraperRateLimitConfig
  ): {
    requestsInLastMinute: number;
    limit: number;
    remaining: number;
    resetTime: number;
    isLimited: boolean;
  } {
    return scraperRateLimiter.getRateLimitStatus(sourceId, config);
  }

  /**
   * Reset rate limit for a source
   */
  resetRateLimit(sourceId: string): void {
    scraperRateLimiter.resetRateLimit(sourceId);
    logger.info('Rate limit reset for source', { sourceId });
  }

  /**
   * Get all rate limit statuses
   */
  getAllRateLimitStatuses(): Record<string, {
    requestsInLastMinute: number;
    lastRequest: number;
  }> {
    return scraperRateLimiter.getAllRateLimitStatuses();
  }
}

// Export singleton instance
export const scraperQueueService = new ScraperQueueService();

/**
 * Error Recovery Service
 * Implements error recovery strategies including exponential backoff,
 * circuit breaker patterns, and error classification
 */

import { logger } from './loggerService';
import { ErrorCode } from '../constants/errorCodes';

/**
 * Error Type Classification
 */
export enum ErrorType {
  TRANSIENT = 'TRANSIENT', // Temporary errors that can be retried
  PERMANENT = 'PERMANENT', // Permanent errors that should not be retried
  RATE_LIMIT = 'RATE_LIMIT', // Rate limiting errors
  TIMEOUT = 'TIMEOUT', // Timeout errors
  NETWORK = 'NETWORK', // Network connectivity errors
  AUTHENTICATION = 'AUTHENTICATION', // Auth errors
  VALIDATION = 'VALIDATION', // Validation errors
  UNKNOWN = 'UNKNOWN', // Unknown errors
}

/**
 * Error Classification Result
 */
export interface ErrorClassification {
  type: ErrorType;
  isRetryable: boolean;
  suggestedDelay: number; // milliseconds
  maxRetries: number;
  errorCode?: ErrorCode;
}

/**
 * Retry Strategy Configuration
 */
export interface RetryConfig {
  maxRetries: number;
  initialDelay: number; // milliseconds
  maxDelay: number; // milliseconds
  backoffMultiplier: number;
  jitterFactor: number; // 0-1, adds randomness to delay
}

/**
 * Circuit Breaker State
 */
export enum CircuitState {
  CLOSED = 'CLOSED', // Normal operation
  OPEN = 'OPEN', // Circuit is open, requests fail immediately
  HALF_OPEN = 'HALF_OPEN', // Testing if service recovered
}

/**
 * Circuit Breaker Configuration
 */
export interface CircuitBreakerConfig {
  failureThreshold: number; // Number of failures before opening
  successThreshold: number; // Number of successes to close from half-open
  timeout: number; // Time to wait before half-open (milliseconds)
  monitoringPeriod: number; // Period to track failures (milliseconds)
}

/**
 * Circuit Breaker Instance
 */
class CircuitBreaker {
  private state: CircuitState = CircuitState.CLOSED;
  private failureCount: number = 0;
  private successCount: number = 0;
  private lastFailureTime?: number;
  private failures: number[] = []; // Timestamps of failures

  constructor(
    private name: string,
    private config: CircuitBreakerConfig
  ) {}

  /**
   * Check if request can proceed
   */
  canProceed(): boolean {
    this.cleanOldFailures();

    if (this.state === CircuitState.OPEN) {
      // Check if timeout has passed
      if (
        this.lastFailureTime &&
        Date.now() - this.lastFailureTime >= this.config.timeout
      ) {
        logger.info('Circuit breaker transitioning to half-open', {
          name: this.name,
          failureCount: this.failureCount,
        });
        this.state = CircuitState.HALF_OPEN;
        this.successCount = 0;
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }

  /**
   * Record successful operation
   */
  recordSuccess(): void {
    if (this.state === CircuitState.HALF_OPEN) {
      this.successCount++;
      if (this.successCount >= this.config.successThreshold) {
        logger.info('Circuit breaker closing', {
          name: this.name,
          successCount: this.successCount,
        });
        this.state = CircuitState.CLOSED;
        this.failureCount = 0;
        this.failures = [];
      }
    } else if (this.state === CircuitState.CLOSED) {
      // Reset failure count on success
      this.failureCount = 0;
      this.failures = [];
    }
  }

  /**
   * Record failed operation
   */
  recordFailure(): void {
    const now = Date.now();
    this.failures.push(now);
    this.lastFailureTime = now;
    this.failureCount++;

    if (this.state === CircuitState.HALF_OPEN) {
      logger.warn('Circuit breaker opening from half-open', {
        name: this.name,
      });
      this.state = CircuitState.OPEN;
      this.successCount = 0;
    } else if (this.state === CircuitState.CLOSED) {
      this.cleanOldFailures();
      if (this.failures.length >= this.config.failureThreshold) {
        logger.warn('Circuit breaker opening', {
          name: this.name,
          failureCount: this.failureCount,
          threshold: this.config.failureThreshold,
        });
        this.state = CircuitState.OPEN;
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * Clean old failures outside monitoring period
   */
  private cleanOldFailures(): void {
    const cutoff = Date.now() - this.config.monitoringPeriod;
    this.failures = this.failures.filter(timestamp => timestamp > cutoff);
  }

  /**
   * Get current state
   */
  getState(): CircuitState {
    return this.state;
  }

  /**
   * Get statistics
   */
  getStats(): {
    state: CircuitState;
    failureCount: number;
    successCount: number;
    recentFailures: number;
  } {
    this.cleanOldFailures();
    return {
      state: this.state,
      failureCount: this.failureCount,
      successCount: this.successCount,
      recentFailures: this.failures.length,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Reset circuit breaker
   */
  reset(): void {
    this.state = CircuitState.CLOSED;
    this.failureCount = 0;
    this.successCount = 0;
    this.failures = [];
    this.lastFailureTime = undefined;
    logger.info('Circuit breaker reset', { name: this.name });
  }
}

/**
 * Error Recovery Service
 */
export class ErrorRecoveryService {
  private circuitBreakers: Map<string, CircuitBreaker> = new Map();
  private defaultRetryConfig: RetryConfig = {
    maxRetries: 3,
    initialDelay: 1000,
    maxDelay: 30000,
    backoffMultiplier: 2,
    jitterFactor: 0.1,
  };
  private defaultCircuitBreakerConfig: CircuitBreakerConfig = {
    failureThreshold: 5,
    successThreshold: 2,
    timeout: 60000, // 1 minute
    monitoringPeriod: 120000, // 2 minutes
  };

  /**
   * Classify error type
   */
  classifyError(error: any): ErrorClassification {
    // Extract error information
    const errorMessage = error?.message || String(error);
    const errorCode = error?.code as ErrorCode | undefined;
    const statusCode = error?.statusCode || error?.status;

    // Network errors (transient)
    if (
      errorMessage.includes('ECONNREFUSED') ||
      errorMessage.includes('ENOTFOUND') ||
      errorMessage.includes('ETIMEDOUT') ||
      errorMessage.includes('ECONNRESET') ||
      errorMessage.includes('network') ||
      errorMessage.includes('fetch failed')
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.NETWORK,
        isRetryable: true,
        suggestedDelay: 2000,
        maxRetries: 5,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Timeout errors (transient)
    if (
      errorMessage.includes('timeout') ||
      errorMessage.includes('timed out') ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.SCRAPER_TIMEOUT ||
      statusCode === 504
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.TIMEOUT,
        isRetryable: true,
        suggestedDelay: 3000,
        maxRetries: 3,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Rate limiting errors (transient with longer delay)
    if (
      errorMessage.includes('rate limit') ||
      errorMessage.includes('too many requests') ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.SCRAPER_RATE_LIMITED ||
      statusCode === 429
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.RATE_LIMIT,
        isRetryable: true,
        suggestedDelay: 60000, // 1 minute
        maxRetries: 3,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Authentication errors (permanent)
    if (
      errorCode === ErrorCode.AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.AUTH_USER_BLOCKED ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.UNAUTHORIZED ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.FORBIDDEN ||
      statusCode === 401 ||
      statusCode === 403
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.AUTHENTICATION,
        isRetryable: false,
        suggestedDelay: 0,
        maxRetries: 0,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Validation errors (permanent)
    if (
      errorCode === ErrorCode.VALIDATION_ERROR ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.SCRAPER_INVALID_CONFIG ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.BAD_REQUEST ||
      statusCode === 400
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.VALIDATION,
        isRetryable: false,
        suggestedDelay: 0,
        maxRetries: 0,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Not found errors (permanent)
    if (
      errorCode === ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.SCRAPER_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND ||
      statusCode === 404
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.PERMANENT,
        isRetryable: false,
        suggestedDelay: 0,
        maxRetries: 0,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Server errors (transient)
    if (statusCode >= 500 && statusCode < 600) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.TRANSIENT,
        isRetryable: true,
        suggestedDelay: 5000,
        maxRetries: 3,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Database errors (transient)
    if (
      errorCode === ErrorCode.DATABASE_CONNECTION_ERROR ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.DATABASE_QUERY_ERROR ||
      errorCode === ErrorCode.DATABASE_TRANSACTION_ERROR
    ) {
      return {
        type: ErrorType.TRANSIENT,
        isRetryable: true,
        suggestedDelay: 2000,
        maxRetries: 3,
        errorCode,
      };
    }

    // Default: unknown error (cautiously retryable)
    return {
      type: ErrorType.UNKNOWN,
      isRetryable: true,
      suggestedDelay: 1000,
      maxRetries: 2,
      errorCode,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate retry delay with exponential backoff
   */
  calculateRetryDelay(
    attemptNumber: number,
    config: RetryConfig = this.defaultRetryConfig
  ): number {
    // Calculate exponential backoff
    const exponentialDelay =
      config.initialDelay * Math.pow(config.backoffMultiplier, attemptNumber);

    // Cap at max delay
    const cappedDelay = Math.min(exponentialDelay, config.maxDelay);

    // Add jitter to prevent thundering herd
    const jitter = cappedDelay * config.jitterFactor * (Math.random() - 0.5);
    const finalDelay = Math.max(0, cappedDelay + jitter);

    return Math.round(finalDelay);
  }

  /**
   * Execute operation with retry logic
   */
  async executeWithRetry<T>(
    operation: () => Promise<T>,
    options?: {
      operationName?: string;
      retryConfig?: Partial<RetryConfig>;
      onRetry?: (error: any, attempt: number, delay: number) => void;
      shouldRetry?: (error: any, attempt: number) => boolean;
    }
  ): Promise<T> {
    const config: RetryConfig = {
      ...this.defaultRetryConfig,
      ...options?.retryConfig,
    };

    let lastError: any;
    let attempt = 0;

    while (attempt <= config.maxRetries) {
      try {
        const result = await operation();
        
        // Log success if this was a retry
        if (attempt > 0) {
          logger.info('Operation succeeded after retry', {
            operationName: options?.operationName,
            attempt,
            totalAttempts: attempt + 1,
          });
        }

        return result;
      } catch (error) {
        lastError = error;
        attempt++;

        // Classify error
        const classification = this.classifyError(error);

        // Check if we should retry
        const shouldRetry =
          options?.shouldRetry?.(error, attempt) ??
          (classification.isRetryable && attempt <= config.maxRetries);

        if (!shouldRetry) {
          logger.error(
            'Operation failed, not retrying',
            error as Error,
            {
              operationName: options?.operationName,
              attempt,
              errorType: classification.type,
              isRetryable: classification.isRetryable,
            }
          );
          throw error;
        }

        // Calculate delay
        const delay = Math.max(
          this.calculateRetryDelay(attempt - 1, config),
          classification.suggestedDelay
        );

        logger.warn('Operation failed, will retry', {
          operationName: options?.operationName,
          attempt,
          maxRetries: config.maxRetries,
          delay,
          errorType: classification.type,
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        });

        // Call retry callback
        options?.onRetry?.(error, attempt, delay);

        // Wait before retry
        await this.sleep(delay);
      }
    }

    // All retries exhausted
    logger.error(
      'Operation failed after all retries',
      lastError as Error,
      {
        operationName: options?.operationName,
        totalAttempts: attempt,
        maxRetries: config.maxRetries,
      }
    );

    throw lastError;
  }

  /**
   * Execute operation with circuit breaker
   */
  async executeWithCircuitBreaker<T>(
    operation: () => Promise<T>,
    options: {
      breakerName: string;
      circuitBreakerConfig?: Partial<CircuitBreakerConfig>;
      fallback?: () => Promise<T>;
    }
  ): Promise<T> {
    // Get or create circuit breaker
    let breaker = this.circuitBreakers.get(options.breakerName);
    if (!breaker) {
      const config: CircuitBreakerConfig = {
        ...this.defaultCircuitBreakerConfig,
        ...options.circuitBreakerConfig,
      };
      breaker = new CircuitBreaker(options.breakerName, config);
      this.circuitBreakers.set(options.breakerName, breaker);
    }

    // Check if circuit is open
    if (!breaker.canProceed()) {
      logger.warn('Circuit breaker is open, request rejected', {
        breakerName: options.breakerName,
        state: breaker.getState(),
      });

      // Use fallback if available
      if (options.fallback) {
        logger.info('Using fallback for circuit breaker', {
          breakerName: options.breakerName,
        });
        return await options.fallback();
      }

      throw new Error(
        `Circuit breaker "${options.breakerName}" is open. Service temporarily unavailable.`
      );
    }

    try {
      const result = await operation();
      breaker.recordSuccess();
      return result;
    } catch (error) {
      breaker.recordFailure();
      throw error;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Execute operation with both retry and circuit breaker
   */
  async executeWithRecovery<T>(
    operation: () => Promise<T>,
    options: {
      operationName: string;
      breakerName: string;
      retryConfig?: Partial<RetryConfig>;
      circuitBreakerConfig?: Partial<CircuitBreakerConfig>;
      fallback?: () => Promise<T>;
      onRetry?: (error: any, attempt: number, delay: number) => void;
    }
  ): Promise<T> {
    return this.executeWithCircuitBreaker(
      () =>
        this.executeWithRetry(operation, {
          operationName: options.operationName,
          retryConfig: options.retryConfig,
          onRetry: options.onRetry,
        }),
      {
        breakerName: options.breakerName,
        circuitBreakerConfig: options.circuitBreakerConfig,
        fallback: options.fallback,
      }
    );
  }

  /**
   * Get circuit breaker by name
   */
  getCircuitBreaker(name: string): CircuitBreaker | undefined {
    return this.circuitBreakers.get(name);
  }

  /**
   * Get all circuit breaker stats
   */
  getAllCircuitBreakerStats(): Record<
    string,
    {
      state: CircuitState;
      failureCount: number;
      successCount: number;
      recentFailures: number;
    }
  > {
    const stats: Record<string, any> = {};
    for (const [name, breaker] of this.circuitBreakers.entries()) {
      stats[name] = breaker.getStats();
    }
    return stats;
  }

  /**
   * Reset circuit breaker
   */
  resetCircuitBreaker(name: string): void {
    const breaker = this.circuitBreakers.get(name);
    if (breaker) {
      breaker.reset();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Reset all circuit breakers
   */
  resetAllCircuitBreakers(): void {
    for (const breaker of this.circuitBreakers.values()) {
      breaker.reset();
    }
    logger.info('All circuit breakers reset');
  }

  /**
   * Sleep utility
   */
  private sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
  }

  /**
   * Check if error is retryable
   */
  isRetryable(error: any): boolean {
    const classification = this.classifyError(error);
    return classification.isRetryable;
  }

  /**
   * Get suggested retry delay for error
   */
  getSuggestedDelay(error: any): number {
    const classification = this.classifyError(error);
    return classification.suggestedDelay;
  }

  /**
   * Get max retries for error
   */
  getMaxRetries(error: any): number {
    const classification = this.classifyError(error);
    return classification.maxRetries;
  }
}

// Export singleton instance
export const errorRecoveryService = new ErrorRecoveryService();

/**
 * Scraper Management Routes
 * Provides CRUD operations for scraper sources with validation, authentication, and error handling
 */

import { FastifyInstance, FastifyRequest, FastifyReply } from 'fastify';
import { scraperSourceService } from '../services/scraperSourceService';
import { scraperQueueService } from '../services/scraperQueueService';
import { requireAdmin } from '../middleware/auth';
import { validate } from '../middleware/validation';
import { schemas } from '../schemas/validationSchemas';
import { logger } from '../services/loggerService';
import { createAppError } from '../middleware/errorHandler';
import { ErrorCode } from '../constants/errorCodes';

/**
 * Scraper Management Routes
 */
export async function scraperManagementRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance) {
  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers
   * Create new scraper source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          body: schemas.scraper.createSource,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const data = request.body as any;
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Creating scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceName: data.name,
          sourceType: data.type,
        });

        const source = await scraperSourceService.createSource(data);

        logger.info('Scraper source created successfully', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: source.id,
          sourceName: source.name,
        });

        return reply.status(201).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper source berhasil dibuat',
          data: source,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to create scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          body: request.body,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers
   * List all scraper sources with pagination and filters
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          query: schemas.scraper.query,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const query = request.query as any;
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Listing scraper sources', {
          userId: user.id,
          filters: query,
        });

        const result = await scraperSourceService.listSources({
          page: query.page,
          limit: query.limit,
          type: query.type,
          enabled: query.enabled,
          search: query.search,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper sources berhasil diambil',
          data: result.sources,
          meta: {
            total: result.total,
            page: result.page,
            limit: result.limit,
            totalPages: result.totalPages,
          },
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to list scraper sources', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          query: request.query,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/:id
   * Get single scraper source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Getting scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        const source = await scraperSourceService.getSource(id);

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper source berhasil diambil',
          data: source,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * PUT /api/admin/scrapers/:id
   * Update scraper source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.put(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
          body: schemas.scraper.updateSource,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const data = request.body as any;
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Updating scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
          changes: Object.keys(data),
        });

        const source = await scraperSourceService.updateSource(id, data);

        logger.info('Scraper source updated successfully', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper source berhasil diupdate',
          data: source,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to update scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
          body: request.body,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * DELETE /api/admin/scrapers/:id
   * Delete scraper source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.delete(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Deleting scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        await scraperSourceService.deleteSource(id);

        logger.info('Scraper source deleted successfully', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper source berhasil dihapus',
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to delete scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/:id/test
   * Test scraper source connectivity
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/test',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Testing scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        const result = await scraperSourceService.testSource(id);

        logger.info('Scraper source test completed', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
          success: result.success,
          responseTime: result.responseTime,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Test scraper source selesai',
          data: result,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to test scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/:id/stats
   * Get scraper source statistics
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/stats',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Getting scraper source stats', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        const stats = await scraperSourceService.getSourceStats(id);

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Statistik scraper source berhasil diambil',
          data: stats,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get scraper source stats', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/:id/run
   * Run scraper immediately (enqueue job)
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/run',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Running scraper source', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        // Verify source exists
        const source = await scraperSourceService.getSource(id);

        if (!source.enabled) {
          throw createAppError(
            'Scraper source tidak aktif',
            ErrorCode.SCRAPER_INVALID_CONFIG,
            400
          );
        }

        // Enqueue job
        const job = scraperQueueService.enqueueJob(id, {
          priority: 10, // High priority for manual runs
          maxRetries: 3,
        });

        logger.info('Scraper job enqueued', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
          jobId: job.id,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper job berhasil dienqueue',
          data: {
            jobId: job.id,
            sourceId: id,
            status: job.status,
          },
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to run scraper source', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/:id/status
   * Get scraper source status (current jobs, circuit breaker, rate limit)
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/status',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Getting scraper source status', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        // Get source
        const source = await scraperSourceService.getSource(id);

        // Get jobs for this source
        const jobs = scraperQueueService.getAllJobs({ sourceId: id });

        // Get circuit breaker stats
        const circuitBreakerStats = scraperQueueService.getCircuitBreakerStats(id);

        // Get rate limit status
        const rateLimitStatus = scraperQueueService.getRateLimitStatus(id, {
          requestsPerMinute: source.rateLimit,
          burstLimit: source.rateLimit * 1.5,
          minDelay: 1000,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Status scraper source berhasil diambil',
          data: {
            source: {
              id: source.id,
              name: source.name,
              enabled: source.enabled,
              lastRun: source.lastRun,
              lastError: source.lastError,
            },
            jobs: {
              total: jobs.length,
              pending: jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'PENDING').length,
              running: jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'RUNNING').length,
              completed: jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'SUCCESS').length,
              failed: jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'FAILED').length,
              recentJobs: jobs.slice(0, 5),
            },
            circuitBreaker: circuitBreakerStats,
            rateLimit: rateLimitStatus,
          },
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get scraper source status', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/logs
   * Get scraper logs with pagination and filters
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/logs',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const query = request.query as any;
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        const page = parseInt(query.page) || 1;
        const limit = parseInt(query.limit) || 50;
        const sourceId = query.sourceId;
        const status = query.status;

        logger.debug('Getting scraper logs', {
          userId: user.id,
          page,
          limit,
          sourceId,
          status,
        });

        // Get jobs from queue service
        const allJobs = scraperQueueService.getAllJobs({
          sourceId,
          status,
        });

        // Paginate
        const total = allJobs.length;
        const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
        const jobs = allJobs.slice(skip, skip + limit);

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Scraper logs berhasil diambil',
          data: jobs,
          meta: {
            total,
            page,
            limit,
            totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
          },
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get scraper logs', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          query: request.query,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/queue/stats
   * Get queue statistics
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/queue/stats',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Getting queue stats', {
          userId: user.id,
        });

        const stats = scraperQueueService.getQueueStats();

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Queue stats berhasil diambil',
          data: stats,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get queue stats', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/queue/clear
   * Clear completed jobs from queue
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/queue/clear',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Clearing completed jobs', {
          userId: user.id,
        });

        const cleared = scraperQueueService.clearCompletedJobs();

        logger.info('Completed jobs cleared', {
          userId: user.id,
          cleared,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: `${cleared} completed jobs berhasil dihapus`,
          data: { cleared },
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to clear completed jobs', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/:id/circuit-breaker/reset
   * Reset circuit breaker for a source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/circuit-breaker/reset',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Resetting circuit breaker', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        scraperQueueService.resetCircuitBreaker(id);

        logger.info('Circuit breaker reset', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Circuit breaker berhasil direset',
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to reset circuit breaker', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/:id/rate-limit/reset
   * Reset rate limit for a source
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/:id/rate-limit/reset',
    {
      preHandler: [
        requireAdmin,
        validate({
          params: schemas.idParam,
        }),
      ],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Resetting rate limit', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        scraperQueueService.resetRateLimit(id);

        logger.info('Rate limit reset', {
          userId: user.id,
          sourceId: id,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Rate limit berhasil direset',
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to reset rate limit', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          sourceId: (request.params as any)?.id,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId/cancel
   * Cancel a running or pending job
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId/cancel',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { jobId } = request.params as { jobId: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Cancelling job', {
          userId: user.id,
          jobId,
        });

        const job = scraperQueueService.cancelJob(jobId);

        logger.info('Job cancelled', {
          userId: user.id,
          jobId,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Job berhasil dibatalkan',
          data: job,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to cancel job', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          jobId: (request.params as any)?.jobId,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * POST /api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId/retry
   * Retry a failed job
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.post(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId/retry',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { jobId } = request.params as { jobId: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.info('Retrying job', {
          userId: user.id,
          jobId,
        });

        const job = scraperQueueService.retryJob(jobId);

        logger.info('Job retried', {
          userId: user.id,
          jobId,
        });

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Job berhasil di-retry',
          data: job,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to retry job', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          jobId: (request.params as any)?.jobId,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );

  /**
   * GET /api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId
   * Get job status
   * @requires Admin authentication
   */
  fastify.get(
    '/api/admin/scrapers/jobs/:jobId',
    {
      preHandler: [requireAdmin],
    },
    async (request: FastifyRequest, reply: FastifyReply) => {
      try {
        const { jobId } = request.params as { jobId: string };
        const user = request.user as { id: string; role: string };

        logger.debug('Getting job status', {
          userId: user.id,
          jobId,
        });

        const job = scraperQueueService.getJobStatus(jobId);

        if (!job) {
          throw createAppError(
            'Job tidak ditemukan',
            ErrorCode.NOT_FOUND,
            404
          );
        }

        return reply.status(200).send({
          success: true,
          message: 'Job status berhasil diambil',
          data: job,
        });
      } catch (error: any) {
        logger.error('Failed to get job status', error, {
          userId: (request.user as any)?.id,
          jobId: (request.params as any)?.jobId,
        });
        throw error;
      }
    }
  );
}

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-KOMIK-MDA\packages\database\prisma\schema.prisma" language="plaintext" >
<content>
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// --- USER & ACCESS CONTROL ---

enum UserRole {
  SUPER_ADMIN
  ADMIN
  EDITOR
  MODERATOR
  USER
}

enum UserStatus {
  AKTIF
  NON_AKTIF
  DIBLOKIR
}

model User {
  id            String        @id @default(cuid())
  email         String        @unique
  username      String        @unique
  name          String?
  password      String
  avatar        String?
  role          UserRole      @default(USER)
  status        UserStatus    @default(AKTIF)
  lastLogin     DateTime?
  comments      Comment[]
  activityLogs  ActivityLog[]
  watchlist     Watchlist[]
  ratings       UserRating[]
  watchHistory  WatchHistory[]
  pageViews     PageView[]
  events        Event[]
  deviceInfo    DeviceInfo[]
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([role])
  @@index([status])
}

// --- CONTENT MANAGEMENT ---

enum ContentStatus {
  ONGOING
  COMPLETED
  HIATUS
  DROPPED
}

enum ContentType {
  ANIME
  MANGA
  DONGHUA
}

model Content {
  id          String        @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String        @unique
  description String?
  imageUrl    String?
  type        ContentType   @default(ANIME)
  status      ContentStatus @default(ONGOING)
  rating      Float         @default(0)
  author      String?
  artist      String?
  studio      String?
  releasedAt  String?       // Year or full date string
  genres      Genre[]       @relation("ContentToGenre")
  tags        Tag[]         @relation("ContentToTag")
  episodes    Episode[]
  comments    Comment[]
  createdAt   DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime      @updatedAt
}

model Episode {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String   @unique
  number      Float
  contentId   String
  content     Content  @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  videoUrl    String?  // For Anime/Donghua
  images      String[] // For Manga (array of image URLs)
  type        String   @default("FREE") // FREE or PREMIUM
  views       Int      @default(0)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Genre {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  name        String    @unique
  slug        String    @unique
  description String?
  status      String    @default("AKTIF")
  contents    Content[] @relation("ContentToGenre")
}

model Tag {
  id       String    @id @default(cuid())
  name     String    @unique
  slug     String    @unique
  contents Content[] @relation("ContentToTag")
}

// --- NEWS & PAGES ---

model News {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String   @unique
  content     String   @db.Text
  imageUrl    String?
  category    String   @default("UMUM")
  isFeatured  Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Page {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  title     String
  slug      String   @unique
  content   String   @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Banner {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  subtitle    String?
  description String?
  imageUrl    String
  link        String?
  order       Int      @default(0)
  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
}

// --- INTERACTION ---

model Comment {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  text      String   @db.Text
  status    String   @default("PENDING") // PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  content   Content  @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

// --- SYSTEM & MARKETING ---

model Ad {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  title     String
  position  String   // e.g., HOMEPAGE_TOP, SIDEBAR
  type      String   @default("IMAGE")
  imageUrl  String?
  linkUrl   String?
  status    String   @default("ACTIVE")
  startDate DateTime?
  endDate   DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model ActivityLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  module    String   // e.g., MANGA, USER, SETTINGS
  action    String   // e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN
  detail    String   @db.Text
  ipAddress String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model Setting {
  id    String @id @default(cuid())
  key   String @unique
  value String @db.Text
}

model SeoConfig {
  id              String  @id @default(cuid())
  title           String?
  description     String?
  keywords        String?
  ogTitle         String?
  ogDescription   String?
  ogImage         String?
  robotsMeta      String? @default("index, follow")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt
}

// --- AUTOMATION & SCRAPING ---

model ScraperSource {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  baseUrl     String
  type        String   // e.g., "MangaDex", "ComicK"
  language    String   @default("EN")
  interval    Int      @default(60) // in minutes
  status      String   @default("Aktif") // Aktif, Non-Aktif, Error
  lastScraped DateTime?
  config      Json?    // Stores data types (Manga, Chapter, etc.) and other settings
  logs        ScraperLog[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model ScraperLog {
  id              String        @id @default(cuid())
  sourceId        String
  source          ScraperSource @relation(fields: [sourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  status          String        // "BERJALAN", "SELESAI", "ERROR", "MENUNGGU"
  itemsFound      Int           @default(0)
  itemsAdded      Int           @default(0)
  itemsFailed     Int           @default(0)
  speedItemPerMin Float         @default(0)
  responseTimeMs  Int           @default(0)
  duration        String?       // e.g., "02:15"
  error           String?       @db.Text
  startedAt       DateTime      @default(now())
  endedAt         DateTime?
}


// --- USER ENGAGEMENT ---

model Watchlist {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  status    String   @default("WATCHING") // WATCHING, COMPLETED, PLAN_TO_WATCH, DROPPED, ON_HOLD
  progress  Int      @default(0) // episode/chapter number
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([userId, contentId])
}

model UserRating {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  score     Float    // 1-10
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([userId, contentId])
}

model WatchHistory {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  episodeId String?
  progress  Float    @default(0) // percentage or page number
  watchedAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId, contentId])
}

// --- RBAC SYSTEM ---

model Permission {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  module      String   // e.g., "CONTENT", "USER", "ANALYTICS", "SETTINGS"
  action      String   // e.g., "CREATE", "READ", "UPDATE", "DELETE"
  rolePermissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([module, action])
  @@index([module])
}

model Role {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  permissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([name])
}

model RolePermission {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  roleId       String
  role         Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  permissionId String
  permission   Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([permissionId])
}

// --- ANALYTICS SYSTEM ---

model PageView {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  path      String
  referrer  String?
  userAgent String?
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([timestamp])
  @@index([path])
}

model Event {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  eventType String   // e.g., "CLICK", "SEARCH", "WATCH", "RATE"
  eventData Json?    // Flexible data storage
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([eventType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model DeviceInfo {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  deviceType String  // e.g., "MOBILE", "TABLET", "DESKTOP"
  os        String?  // e.g., "Windows", "iOS", "Android"
  browser   String?  // e.g., "Chrome", "Safari", "Firefox"
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([deviceType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}
